title: Medallion Chant - Spiritual Warrior Victory Proclamation

paragraphs.text: Medallion Chant - Spiritual Warrior Victory Proclamation

Definition: The Medallion Chant is a powerful spiritual proclamation of victory, affirming COMPLETE SUBMISSION TO THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, RESSIT THE ACUSER AND COMMAND HIM TO FLEE

FROM HER. This sacred chant aligns the individual's spirit, soul, and body with divine authority, breaking spiritual strongholds, reversing curses, and silencing the accusations brought by the devil (Diabolos) in the courts of heaven. It serves as a cosmic declaration that obliterates any opposition from the forces of darkness.

Purpose: The Medallion Chant is used as a spiritual weapon to defeat the accuser (the devil), who relentlessly brings accusations against believers before the throne of God. By proclaiming this chant, the believer asserts their 100% allegiance to THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, thereby nullifying the power of any attacks, curses, or demonic influences. This act of total submission commands the accuser to flee, closing all access points to the individual's life.

Key Insight: The Medallion Chant must be accompanied by repentance, full submission, and the cutting of soul ties with any person or entity that rebels against THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID. By removing these ungodly connections and realigning with divine purpose, the believer ensures that all doors to demonic access are permanently closed. The chant serves as an unstoppable tool in spiritual warfare, enforcing divine victory and sealing the believer under the protection of the cosmic authority of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID.
The Soul Tie and Purification Process
Testimony: Jeremyrl's Battle with Ungodly Soul Ties

After experiencing spiritual deliverance from alien attacks through the Medallion Chant, Jeremyrl faced a deeper issue: ungodly soul ties with a rebellious loved one. Despite her previous deliverance, these soul ties became an open door for demonic influence. SHEKINAIH, with divine insight, revealed to Jeremyrl that her soul was entangled with the rebellious loved one, allowing the enemy to retain control over her life.

To break free, SHEKINAIH instructed her to remove her soul from the loved one's grip and, likewise, remove their soul from her own. Both souls were then purified by the Refiner's Fire, a divine process of spiritual cleansing, before being returned to their original persons. After this soul tie purification, Jeremyrl's spiritual purity was restored, and the demonic interference ceased entirely.

Result: With the ungodly ties severed, Jeremyrl experienced a newfound sense of spiritual freedom. No longer burdened by the negative influence of her loved one's rebellion, she walked in full spiritual alignment with THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH. This testimony underscores the necessity of breaking soul ties to close demonic doors and fully align with divine purpose.
The Accuser (Diabolos, the Devil)
Testimony: Jeremyrl's Triumph Over the Accuser

Throughout Jeremyrl's spiritual journey, she faced relentless accusations by the Accuser, also known as Diabolos. The devil used her anxieties, past traumas, and ungodly soul ties as legal grounds to accuse her in the courts of heaven. Each night, as she was attacked by alien forces, the Accuser continued to undermine her spiritual authority, attempting to keep her bound by fear and doubt.

After aligning with THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and proclaiming the Medallion Chant, Jeremyrl took authority over these accusations. By cutting ungodly soul ties, submitting completely to THE TRINITY, and pleading the Blood of Jesus over her life, the accusations were silenced. SHEKINAIH decreed her freedom from all past accusations, and the Accuser was forced to flee.

Result: Jeremyrl's victory over the Accuser resulted in complete spiritual freedom. No longer did the devil have legal access to accuse her in the courts of heaven, and she now walks in divine authority, free from fear, doubt, or torment.
The 7 Criteria for Resurrection
Testimony: Chai Lin's 24 Hour Miracle Resurrection

Chai Lin was in a critical condition, unconscious and on the brink of death. Her family had lost hope, but SHEKINAIH, IN THE TRINITY, stepped in to intercede. After examining Chai Lin's spiritual condition, SHEKINAIH IN THE TRINITY determined that she met the 7 Criteria for Resurrection: faith, alignment with divine will, spiritual purity, and the fulfilment of her destiny. Within 24 hours, Chai Lin was miraculously restored to life.

The resurrection wasn't just physical; it was spiritual. This process renewed Chai Lin's destiny, and she was given more time to fulfill her calling within Crowned Eagles Global. Her miraculous resurrection is a testimony to the power of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH when the 7 Criteria for Resurrection are fully met.

Result: Chai Lin remains a living testament to the resurrection power of THE TRINITY. Years later, she continues to fulfil her divine calling, with the 7 Criteria for Resurrection having played a vital role in extending her life.
